tags.name: Admin: API Tokens
tags.description: Administer API tokens across all users.

tags.name: Admin: Audit Logs
tags.description: Review administrator audit events and security-relevant activity.

tags.name: Admin: Dashboard
tags.description: Read administrator dashboard metrics and system statistics.

tags.name: Admin: Invitations
tags.description: Manage account invitations and registration links.

tags.name: Admin: OIDC Providers
tags.description: Manage OpenID Connect provider configuration.

tags.name: Admin: System Settings
tags.description: View, update, reset, and test system-wide settings.

tags.name: Admin: Timeline Regeneration
tags.description: Preview, create, inspect, and retry timeline regeneration campaigns.

tags.name: Admin: Users
tags.description: Manage users, roles, status, passwords, and account deletion.

tags.name: User: AI Assistant
tags.description: Manage AI assistant settings and chat with the configured AI provider.

tags.name: User: API Tokens
tags.description: Manage API tokens owned by the authenticated user.

tags.name: User: Authentication
tags.description: Exchange mobile session codes for authenticated sessions.

tags.name: User: Coverage
tags.description: Read and manage coverage grid status, cells, and recalculation jobs.

tags.name: User: Digests
tags.description: Read monthly and yearly movement digests.

tags.name: User: Favorites
tags.description: Manage favorite places, areas, distinct values, and reconciliation.

tags.name: User: Friends
tags.description: Manage friends, location sharing, permissions, and friend discovery.

tags.name: User: GPS Data
tags.description: Ingest, query, update, export, and delete GPS points.

tags.name: User: GPS Integrations
tags.description: Ingest location updates from Traccar clients.

tags.name: User: GPS Sources
tags.description: Manage GPS source configuration, telemetry mappings, and status.

tags.name: User: Geocoding
tags.description: Manage reverse geocoding results, normalization, providers, and reconciliation.

tags.name: User: Geofences
tags.description: Manage geofence rules, events, templates, and notification tests.

tags.name: User: Home
tags.description: Read content used by the home page.

tags.name: User: Immich
tags.description: Manage Immich configuration and retrieve Immich photo data.

tags.name: User: Import and Export
tags.description: Upload files and manage chunked imports.

tags.name: User: Journey Insights
tags.description: Read journey insight summaries.

tags.name: User: Location Analytics
tags.description: Search and analyze visited cities, countries, places, and visits.

tags.name: User: Notifications
tags.description: Read and update notification seen state.

tags.name: User: Period Tags
tags.description: Manage period tags and overlap checks.

tags.name: User: Places
tags.description: Read and update place details, visits, photos, and exports.

tags.name: User: Sharing
tags.description: Manage shared location links.

tags.name: User: Statistics
tags.description: Read movement statistics for range, week, and month views.

tags.name: User: System
tags.description: Read application version and version status.

tags.name: User: Timeline
tags.description: Read timelines and manage timeline generation, jobs, and overrides.

tags.name: User: Trips
tags.description: Read trip workspace timeline and path data.

tags.name: User: Trips and Planning
tags.description: Manage trip plan items and visit overrides.

tags.name: User: Users
tags.description: Register users and manage the authenticated user profile, avatar, password, and preferences.
